mapper.sql: id, document_id, kb_id, kb_version, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, title, source_type, object_path, source_document_id, source_snapshot_id, category_id, product_line, status, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted

kb.id, kb.kb_id, kb.tenant_id, kb.scope, kb.owner_user_id, kb.name, kb.description, kb.kb_type, kb.source_kb_id, kb.source_version, kb.current_version, kb.enabled, kb.status, kb.locked, kb.created_by, kb.created_at, kb.updated_by, kb.updated_at, kb.deleted, COALESCE(COUNT(d.document_id), 0) AS document_count
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN kb_document d ON d.kb_id = kb.kb_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE GROUP BY kb.id ORDER BY kb.updated_at DESC, kb.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_knowledge_base kb WHERE
SELECT FROM kb_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN kb_document d ON d.kb_id = kb.kb_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE kb.kb_id = #{kbId} AND kb.deleted = FALSE GROUP BY kb.id LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM kb_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN kb_document d ON d.kb_id = kb.kb_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE kb.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND kb.kb_type = 'CASE_LIBRARY' AND kb.deleted = FALSE GROUP BY kb.id LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM kb_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN kb_document d ON d.kb_id = kb.kb_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE kb.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND kb.scope = #{scope} AND kb.deleted = FALSE
AND kb.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}
AND kb.owner_user_id IS NULL
GROUP BY kb.id ORDER BY CASE WHEN kb.kb_type = 'CASE_LIBRARY' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, kb.created_at ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_knowledge_base ( id, kb_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, name, description, kb_type, source_kb_id, source_version, current_version, enabled, status, locked, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{kbId}, #{tenantId}, #{scope}, #{ownerUserId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{kbType}, #{sourceKbId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{currentVersion}, #{enabled}, #{status}, #{locked}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, locked = #{locked}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET current_version = #{versionNo}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET deleted = TRUE, status = 'DELETED', enabled = FALSE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_version ( id, version_id, kb_id, version_no, version_type, source_kb_id, source_version_no, note, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{versionId}, #{kbId}, #{versionNo}, #{versionType}, #{sourceKbId}, #{sourceVersionNo}, #{note}, #{createdBy}, FALSE ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id, version_id, kb_id, version_no, version_type, source_kb_id, source_version_no, note, created_by, created_at, deleted FROM kb_version WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY version_no DESC

SELECT FROM kb_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN kb_document d ON d.kb_id = kb.kb_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE kb.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND kb.scope = #{scope} AND kb.enabled = TRUE AND kb.status = 'ACTIVE' AND kb.deleted = FALSE
AND kb.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}
AND kb.owner_user_id IS NULL
GROUP BY kb.id ORDER BY CASE WHEN kb.kb_type = 'CASE_LIBRARY' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, kb.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_contribution_application ( id, application_id, tenant_id, application_type, source_document_id, source_kb_id, source_snapshot_id, target_kb_id, target_version_no, applicant_user_id, status, target_category_id, reason, reject_reason, review_comment, reviewer_user_id, reviewed_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{applicationId}, #{tenantId}, #{applicationType}, #{sourceDocumentId}, #{sourceKbId}, #{sourceSnapshotId}, #{targetKbId}, #{targetVersionNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{status}, #{targetCategoryId}, #{reason}, #{rejectReason}, #{reviewComment}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{reviewedAt}, FALSE )
mapper.select: SELECT id, application_id, tenant_id, application_type, source_document_id, source_kb_id, source_snapshot_id, target_kb_id, target_version_no, applicant_user_id, status, target_category_id, reason, reject_reason, review_comment, reviewer_user_id, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_contribution_application WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_contribution_application SET status = #{status}, target_kb_id = #{targetKbId}, target_version_no = #{targetVersionNo}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_snapshot_document ( id, snapshot_id, source_kb_id, source_version, source_document_id, title, source_type, object_path, category_id, product_line, enabled, status, fingerprint, sort_order, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{snapshotId}, #{sourceKbId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceDocumentId}, #{title}, #{sourceType}, #{objectPath}, #{categoryId}, #{productLine}, #{enabled}, #{status}, #{fingerprint}, #{sortOrder}, FALSE )
mapper.select: SELECT id, snapshot_id, source_kb_id, source_version, source_document_id, title, source_type, object_path, category_id, product_line, enabled, status, fingerprint, sort_order, created_at, deleted FROM kb_snapshot_document WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_document WHERE
SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document ( id, document_id, kb_id, kb_version, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, title, source_type, object_path, source_document_id, source_snapshot_id, category_id, product_line, status, enabled, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{documentId}, #{kbId}, #{kbVersion}, #{tenantId}, #{scope}, #{ownerUserId}, #{title}, #{sourceType}, #{objectPath}, #{sourceDocumentId}, #{sourceSnapshotId}, #{categoryId}, #{productLine}, #{status}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET title = #{title}, source_type = #{sourceType}, category_id = #{categoryId}, product_line = #{productLine}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE kb_document SET
status = #{status},
enabled = #{enabled},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE kb_document SET deleted = TRUE, status = 'DELETED', enabled = FALSE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT t.name FROM kb_document_tag dt INNER JOIN kb_tag t ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id AND t.deleted = FALSE WHERE dt.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY t.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_tag (id, tag_id, tenant_id, name, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tagId}, #{tenantId}, #{name}, FALSE) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO kb_document_tag (document_id, tag_id) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{tagId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO kb_category (id, category_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{tenantId}, #{scope}, #{ownerUserId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, tenant_id, scope, owner_user_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_document WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, tag_id, tenant_id, name, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM kb_tag WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = FALSE
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_document_tag dt INNER JOIN kb_document d ON d.document_id = dt.document_id AND d.deleted = FALSE WHERE dt.tag_id = #{tagId}

SELECT task_id, document_id, kb_id, kb_version, task_type, status, progress, chunk_count, embedding_model, retry_count, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM kb_ingestion_task WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('READY', 'FAILED', 'FAILED_RETRYABLE', 'DELETED') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_ingestion_task SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, embedding_model = #{embeddingModel}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'READY' AND enabled = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE AND ( (scope = 'PUBLIC' AND owner_user_id IS NULL) OR (scope = 'PERSONAL' AND owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}) ) ORDER BY updated_at DESC
